goal: Convert the O59 rendered preview QA pack into fap-web contract-test requirements without writing code in this package.

canonical_profile.axis: 高敏感 × 中高开放 × 克制进入

hard_boundaries: Do not write new Big Five body copy.
Do not modify B5-B1 core body assets.
Do not invent frontend fallback prose.
If a surface harness does not exist, mark it pending_surface and do not claim pass.
revision_notes: v0.1.1 fixes manifest file list/count consistency.
v0.1.1 deduplicates surfaces arrays, including duplicated pdf entries.
v0.1.1 strengthens contextual all matching: no raw substring scan.

required_codex_output_structure.rule: Every declared surface must appear in exactly one of pending_surfaces, passed_surfaces, or failed_surfaces. pending_surfaces do not count as passed.

all_contextual_rule.normalization: trim visible text node; collapse whitespace; compare exact visible token
allowed_context: non-rendered JSON, TypeScript, fixture, or QA metadata
forbidden_context: standalone visible line exactly equal to 'all'
placeholder/debug leakage rendered in facet rows or table cells
raw internal placeholder exposed to user-visible UI
all_contextual_rule.implementation_warning: Do not use raw substring matching for 'all'. Do not fail 'callout', 'allowlisted', or internal code strings.
